ai_summary: Central Depository Services (India) Limited (CDSL) has been penalized ₹1 crore by SEBI in connection with a malware incident from November 2022, citing observations related to cybersecurity and operational resilience. While CDSL states there is no material financial or operational impact beyond the penalty itself, this regulatory action represents a red flag concerning the robustness of a critical financial infrastructure provider's cyber defenses.
